title: gamar #1584
definition:
1) to end, come to an end, complete, cease
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to come to an end, be no more
        1a2) to bring to an end, complete
 2) (TWOT) to fail, perfect, perform
nasbUsage:

 2) (TWOT) to fail, perfect, perform

    NASB:  to end, come to an end, complete
